# Release v1.2.1

Audit fixes: deprecated API cleanup, configurable board size, `RESET` event payload, and improved game status handling.

---

## Changelog

## [1.2.1] - 2026-05-18

### Added

- Configurable board size via `GameOptions` (`new Game({ boardSize: 16 })`) — `GameOptions` exported from public API
- `getFieldByIndex` and `setFieldByIndex` added to `IBoard` interface
- Payload added to `RESET` event — `GameEventMap[RESET]` now uses optional `GameEventPayload` (no breaking change)
- Getter `board` added to `IGame`

### Fixed

- `savePlayerMove` internally called deprecated `isFieldSelected(index + 1)` — now uses `isFieldSelectedByIndex(index)`
- Both `console.warn` calls removed from `savePlayerMove` — `PlayerMoveStatus` return value is sufficient
- `_updateGameStatus` failed to clear win/draw state on reset — removed `if (isNotRunning)` guard; `reset()` now calls `_updateGameStatus()` instead of setting status manually
- `EventEmit` declared `void` return type — now generic `EventEmit<T>` used by `IGame` as `EventEmit<this>` for correct fluent API typing
- Deprecated methods `savePlayerSelection`, `isFieldSelected`, `getBoard` marked `@deprecated` in `IGame`

### Changed

- `Board` accepts optional `size` parameter (defaults to `9`)
- Old `IBoard` methods marked `@deprecated`

[1.2.1]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1
